target.title: [codex] Add Even Hub glasses bootstrap identity
target.body:
Related: #98227

## What Problem This Solves

Resolves part of the Even G2 / Even Hub glasses node proposal by adding the smallest Gateway-side bootstrap identity slice for discussion.

Even G2 is a product name, so this PR keeps the runtime/platform metadata broader: `platform: "even-hub"`, `deviceFamily: "glasses"`, and `modelIdentifier: "Even G2"`.

## Why This Change Was Made

This is intentionally smaller than the broader policy/docs preview in solavrc/openclaw#2. It does not import the Even Hub app, change node command policy defaults, enable Canvas plugin defaults, or add platform docs.

The shipped shape only:

- accepts `openclaw-even-g2-node` as a Gateway client id;
- allows matching Even Hub glasses metadata to use the existing native setup-code bootstrap path;
- keeps spoofed/mismatched metadata on the owner-approval path;
- keeps native/browser UI origin checks applied to the UI role;
- updates the plugin SDK API baseline for the exported client id surface.

## User Impact

No behavior changes for existing users unless a client connects with the new Even Hub glasses client id and matching metadata.

For Even G2 node development, this provides a concrete minimal seam for maintainer review before any app import, node command policy defaults, Canvas defaults, or docs are proposed.

## Evidence

Local validation:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.auth.control-ui.test.ts src/gateway/server.ios-client-id.test.ts
pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check
```

AI-assisted: yes, Codex helped prepare the patch and run validation.
target.author: solavrc
